name: Lobbying Tax Safe Harbors

eligibility.description: Available to 501(c)(3) organizations that have made a 501(h) election. Activities must be limited to nonpartisan research, technical advice requested by government bodies, or self-defense communications regarding the organization's existence.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes specific activities from the definition of 'influencing legislation,' thereby avoiding the 25% excise tax on excess lobbying expenditures.
